narrative:
Precinct Rush Township D (precinct in Scioto County) has 244 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.9%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.6 percentage points.
